name_en: Top-tier original with full set of packaging
name_cn:
Top-tier original with full set of packaging
In stock!!️
After much anticipation, the Montaigne 30 Small is finally here 😝. The size is moderate, perfect for daily outings 🙋🏻‍♀️. Classic shape, iconic letter lock 🔑, paired with an exquisite chain strap, combining modernity and elegance, a perfect fusion of retro and fashion 🥳.
size:21*6*12cm
